remarks: Enjoy convenient downtown living in this spacious and updated one-bedroom, one-bath end-unit at the sought-after Schuyler Condominium complex. Ideally located within minutes of everything downtown Stamford has to offer, including shopping, restaurants, theaters, the mall, Mill River Park, and the train station. The open-concept floor plan features a well-appointed kitchen with a breakfast bar that overlooks the combined living and dining areas, creating an inviting space for everyday living and entertaining. The generously sized bedroom offers ample closet space and is complemented by a full bath. Residents enjoy access to a community rooftop sundeck with sweeping views of Long Island Sound and the Stamford skyline. Additional highlights include an in-unit washer and dryer, secure garage parking, and the privacy of an end-unit location.
